item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:status","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering encodes a non-spatial ordering in members’ thoughts but not the criterial esteem or accord that distinguishes social standing; add evaluative regard and avoid requiring both higher and lower counterparts."}
